page: Microsoft Azure E112iads_v5 is an isolated virtual machine instance powered by the AMD EPYC 7763 processor, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 112 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 56 physical cores with multithreading enabled running at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. The instance is equipped with 672.0 GB of system memory, providing 6.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 3891 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier multi-core CPU performance, with stress-ng multi-core scoring 151147.09 and PassMark CPU scoring 84582.8, both placing in the top 10% of tested systems. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark memory tests also achieved top-tier status. Single-core performance is strong, with a stress-ng single-core score of 2917.28 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1724.0. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is strong at 6810.51 GB/sec, though large-block uncached read and write speeds fall into the average tier.

The E112iads_v5 is highly suited for memory-intensive and database workloads, as demonstrated by strong PassMark database operations and Redis SET performance of 101.22 million operations per second. It also handles large-scale multi-threaded tasks such as software compilation, image processing, and ray tracing efficiently. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated hardware allocation and high resource density of this isolated instance offer a balanced tradeoff for enterprise-level database hosting, data processing, and moderate LLM inference tasks without requiring dedicated GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure E112iads_v5 is an isolated virtual machine instance featuring 112 dedicated vCPUs and 56 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it is equipped with 672.0 GB of RAM and 3891 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. The server delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, as evidenced by outstanding stress-ng and PassMark CPU scores, alongside strong memory bandwidth for small cached blocks. It lacks a dedicated GPU but offers strong performance in multi-threaded tasks, database operations, and software compilation. This resource-dense profile makes the E112iads_v5 highly cost-effective for enterprise databases, memory-intensive data processing, and large-scale multi-threaded workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E112iads_v5 is an isolated instance with 112 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 3891 GB local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for enterprise databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E112iads_v5 is an isolated AMD-powered instance with 112 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 3891 GB local storage for database workloads.
tagline: An isolated, high-capacity AMD EPYC instance featuring 112 dedicated vCPUs and 672 GB RAM for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by AMD EPYC 7763 with 112 dedicated vCPUs and 56 physical cores
Equipped with 672.0 GB of RAM and 3891 GB of local storage
Delivers top-tier multi-core CPU and multi-threaded decompression performance
Strong database operations and Redis performance exceeding 100 million operations per second
Optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and large-scale data processing
